Text.Key: 15 consecutive points between plus 1 sigma and minus 1 sigma
Text.L: 15 consecutive points between plus 1 sigma and minus 1 sigma
15 consecutive points between plus 1 sigma and minus 1 sigma

Text.Key: 2 out of 3 consecutive points beyond 2 sigma
Text.L: 2 out of 3 consecutive points beyond 2 sigma
2 out of 3 consecutive points beyond 2 sigma

Text.Key: 4 out of 5 consecutive points beyond 1 sigma
Text.L: 4 out of 5 consecutive points beyond 1 sigma
4 out of 5 consecutive points beyond 1 sigma
중심선(CL)을 기준으로 위로 연속 7점 이상인 경우
중심선(CL)을 기준으로 아래로 연속 7점 이상인 경우

Text.Key: 8 consecutive points beyond plus 1 sigma and minus 1 sigma
Text.L: 8 consecutive points beyond plus 1 sigma and minus 1 sigma
8 consecutive points beyond plus 1 sigma and minus 1 sigma

Text.Key: 8 consecutive points same side of average
Text.L: 8 consecutive points same side of average
중심선(CL)을 기준으로 위, 혹은 아래로 8점 이상이 연속적으로 존재하는 경우
8 consecutive points same side of average
